description: Alpic is a cloud platform for building, deploying, and distributing MCP servers and ChatGPT apps. It provides hosted project management, deployments, analytics, monitoring, and related developer tooling.
summary: Alpic exposes a REST API at `https://api.alpic.ai/v1`, a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.alpic.ai/mcp`, and an npm-distributed `alpic` CLI; all require authentication via Alpic-issued credentials, with OAuth supported for MCP/CLI and API keys for REST/CLI.
